title: Udayakumar custodial death: CBI moves Supreme Court against acquittal of police officers
description: The Supreme Court on Friday (April 17) issued notice to two accused police officers from Kerala on a plea challenging their acquittal in the Udayakumar custodial death case [Central Bureau of Investigation vs. Jitha Kumar K & Ors.].A Bench of Justices Vikram Nath and Sandeep Mehta sought responses from the accused police officers on the appeal filed by the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) against the Kerala High Court's verdict acquitting the two officers. "Issue notice returnable on 19
